title: Getting Started
body: Getting Started kov is a systems language for RISC-V embedded. no LLVM, no runtime. source goes in, firmware comes out. try it in your browser go to kov.dev/playground. type code on the left, see asse

title: Language Reference
body: Language Reference types kov has explicit types with no implicit promotion. u8 + u32 is a compile error.  typesizedescription  u81 byteunsigned 8-bit u162 bytesunsigned 16-bit u324 bytesunsigned 32-bi

title: CLI Reference
body: CLI Reference kov has 17 commands. here's what each does. kov build compile to binary. textCopykov build blink.kov -o firmware.elf kov build blink.kov -o firmware.bin kov build hello.kov -o hello --ta
